title: arenaria radicans
intro: Arenaria radicans, also known as sea pink or mountain sandwort, is a flowering plant that belongs to the carnation family and is native to the coastal regions of Europe and North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Arenaria radicans include reducing inflammation, soothing wounds, and treating various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of the plant include making teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
